summary: Canon métier briques typées trimmed from 8 to 5. Tension, Alternative, Trigger dropped (zero schema instances, zero skill consumer, zero brand instance). Snake_case enum convention enforced across R&D schemas (kebab-case migration). 100% description coverage on profile.schema.json + spec.schema.json top-level fields. Title casing standardized (EN, Title Case) on R&D schemas. Cartograph gains --incomplete mode for partial brand discovery. One typo fix in _TEMPLATE audience example. Stress test panel scored 32.75/50 (NO-GO threshold 35/50); ship accepted with documented limitations (Tension is a runtime composition pattern, not a stored brique — pattern documentation deferred to a future skill production cycle).

changes.rationale: Tension, Alternative, Trigger were 100% doctrinal: zero R&D schema instances, zero skill consumers, zero brand workspace instances. Drop aligns canon with implementation reality. Final canon briques typées: Pain, Bénéfice, JTBD, AwarenessStage, ChainNiveau.
R&D draft schemas matching the 3 dropped canon entries. Never consumed, never instantiated.

Snake_case enforced on enum values across R&D schemas. Resolves WS:profile (snake) vs R&D awareness-stage (kebab) split that blocked future $ref refactor. Examples: problem-aware → problem_aware, spec-produit → spec_produit, test-result → test_result, decision-trace → decision_trace, operator-statement → operator_statement, third-party → third_party, brand-filtered → brand_filtered, voix-off → voix_off.

Title casing standardized to EN Title Case: 'AwarenessStage' → 'Awareness Stage', 'Bénéfice' → 'Benefit', 'ChainNiveau' → 'Chain Niveau', 'Position de marque' → 'Brand Position'. Matches template baseline EN convention.

100% description coverage on top-level fields. profile.schema.json: 12 fields (meta, identity, role, psychology, decision_process, behavior, voice, pain_points, benefits, objections, market_position, research_meta). spec.schema.json: 17 fields (meta, identity, specs, active_principle, unique_mechanism, benefits, problems_solved, promise, proofs, compliance, sensory_profile, sustainability, market_context, competitive_comparison, gift_economy, pricing, related_products). Pre-cleanup coverage was 0%.

Added `cartograph --learn brand=<slug> --incomplete` mode: allows partial cartograph in brand mode without `wedge_complete: true` requirement. Outputs partial synthesis READ-ONLY with explicit warning + 3 prioritized completion decisions.

Renamed in-skill 'Layer 2 — product page HTML' → 'Product detail page scraping' to avoid collision with the doctrinal 'Layer 2 = APIs callable through skills' in root CLAUDE.md § Connected tools. Added large-catalogue (>200 SKUs) sampling rule: read pages 1, 2, recent-published instead of full enumeration; surface volume to operator + invite specific URL.
Typo fix in tag namespace example: 'awareness:solution-aware' → 'awareness:solution_aware'. Aligns example with the snake_case enum convention enforced in profile.schema.json.

breaking_changes: Any R&D draft consumer (none currently — drafts were uninstantiated) referencing kebab-case enum values must migrate to snake_case.
Canon entries Tension, Alternative, Trigger removed from docs/internal/canon.md. No template skill was consuming them; no migration path needed.
operator_impact: None visible. Internal doctrine cleanup. Operators continue to see the same skill behaviors. Cartograph gains an explicit partial-output mode for early-stage brands.

stress_test.verdict: NO-GO threshold not met; ship accepted with documented limitations
documented_limitations: Tension is treated as a runtime composition pattern (core_desire + beliefs_limiting + emotion), not a stored brique. Pattern documentation in framework (e.g. voc-coding.md) deferred to a future cold-acquisition copy production cycle.
Antagonist (positioning narrative concept) flagged as missing typed brique. Currently unstructured in brand.json#/positioning/differentiation. Roadmap'd for a future brand-strategy session.
audit-meta-account v1.1 covers ~70% of Meta health checks. Missing: CBO/ABO usage, DSA detection, Advantage+ shopping flag, multi-account per brand. Roadmap'd for v1.2.
produce-launch-bundle orchestrator (mine-voc → angles → briefs end-to-end) flagged by panel; deferred.
